description:
Performance issues in the mixer view:
1. All 16 ChannelStrip components re-render on any mixer state change because
   parent doesn't use React.memo (web/src/MixerPage.tsx lines 70-99)
2. useMixer calls syncFromRust() after every setter (lines 277, 285, 294, 302),
   causing immediate full state re-read and re-render even for local changes
3. useMidiKeyboard dependency array includes noteForKey which changes every
   render due to octave dependency (line 114)

Fix: React.memo for ChannelStrip. Debounce syncFromRust(). Stabilize hook deps.
title: Optimize MixerPage rendering: memoize ChannelStrip and debounce syncFromRust
